message:
feat(tantivy_reindex): Cx-first reindex_range + index_loop_exclusive (ft-xbnl0.2.3)

Follow-on to tick 55. Extends the Cx-first surface on ReindexPipeline
from `full_reindex` to `reindex_range` and its dedicated
exclusive-range loop.

Additions (strictly additive, asupersync-runtime-gated):

  * `ReindexPipeline::index_loop_exclusive_with_cx(cx, ...)` —
    Cx-first parallel of `index_loop_exclusive`. Adds
    `cx.checkpoint()?` at the top of each batch iteration with
    current_ordinal + batches_committed embedded in the
    cancellation error. Per-record body is CPU-only (document
    mapping + writer ops), so cancellation granularity is
    per-batch — matches ticks 52/53/55.

  * `ReindexPipeline::reindex_range_with_cx(cx, ...)` — Cx-first
    parallel of `reindex_range`. Pre-flight checkpoint gates the
    empty-range short-circuit (to <= from still returns
    `Ok(ReindexProgress::new())` without touching storage) and
    the event reader construction. Delegates to
    `index_loop_exclusive_with_cx` for the main loop.

Legacy `reindex_range` and `index_loop_exclusive` remain untouched.

Regression test (new)
`reindex_range_with_cx_matches_legacy_exclusive_bounds`:

  * Two separate AppendLogRecorderStorage directories (legacy + cx)
    with identical 10-event populations.
  * Runs both variants with the same `[5, 8)` exclusive range.
  * Asserts ReindexProgress parity across every counter field.
  * Additionally asserts the indexed doc `event_id` slice is
    bit-for-bit equivalent between the two paths (`["e5", "e6",
    "e7"]`). If the exclusive-upper-bound check drifted on the Cx
    path (e.g. include ordinal == to_ordinal by mistake), the
    ids_cx slice would include "e8" and diverge from ids_legacy.

This directly exercises both new additions: `reindex_range_with_cx`
calls `index_loop_exclusive_with_cx` internally, so if either path
regressed the exclusive semantics, the test would catch it.

Cx-first trail progress on `tantivy_reindex.rs`:
  * `full_reindex`        → `full_reindex_with_cx`        (tick 55)
  * `reindex_range`       → `reindex_range_with_cx`       (tick 56)
  * `reindex_range_observed` — pending
  * `backfill`            — pending

Verification (local fork bypass):
  * tantivy_reindex:: — 92 passed / 0 failed (tick 55: 91 -> tick
    56: 92, +1 new parity test; all 8 legacy reindex_range tests
    still green)
  * cargo build -p frankenterm-core --lib — clean (35.06s)
  * cargo fmt -p frankenterm-core -- --check — clean

Bead: ft-xbnl0.2.3

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
